name: financial-modeling-tools
description: Frist Capital financial model build system for Claude for Excel: foundation skills (core rules + firm formatting), a quarterly KPI tracker, post-earnings updates, and a 13-phase pipeline (phases 0-12) that captures everything a company reports onto Annual/Quarterly Historicals tabs and builds an institutional 3-statement model with driver-based revenue, ASC 842 leases, credit-adjusted leverage, and XIRR returns.
